name: Get InsightVM Remediated Findings
description: Retrieves all vulnerability findings that were remediated since a given date across all Rapid7 InsightVM assets. Paginates through all results. Each finding is annotated with the source asset identifier, IP, and host name.

since.description: ISO 8601 datetime (e.g. '2024-01-15T00:00:00Z') — returns findings remediated since this point in time

severity_filter.description: Vulnerability severity filter using InsightVM Query Builder syntax (e.g. "severity IN ['Critical', 'Severe']")
